subject: 📣 THIS JUST IN: 📣
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
***TRIPLE-MATCH ON ALL GIFTS EFFECTIVE IMMEDIATELY!*** Your gift to fight McConnell will go 4x as far!
---
[ ](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care-triple-match?refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
**_JUST IN: ALL GRASSROOTS GIFTS TRIPLE-MATCHED_
[We need you, team! Pitch in today for the most impact >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care-triple-match?refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
It's time to FIGHT back, team! Here's where we stand:

* ➢ Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump tried to strong-arm the Senate into a vote that would strip _22 million Americans_ of health care and decimate Medicaid. _**DESPICABLE!**_

* ➢ But Americans across the country raised their voices and put democracy on full display -- forcing McConnell to postpone the vote by ONE WEEK. _**POWERFUL!**_

* ➢ Now, with the our end-of-quarter FEC deadline only hours away, we just tripled down on our McConnell counterstrike by announcing a **TRIPLE-MATCH** on all grassroots gifts before the FEC deadline. _**AND WE NEED YOU MORE THAN EVER!**_

****Don 't miss this opportunity to make the most impact -- stepping up when Democrats are counting on you most! Team, will you pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift to show McConnell we mean business? ****

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care-triple-match?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care-triple-match?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care-triple-match?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care-triple-match?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/protect-our-care-triple-match?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care-triple-match?refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=200,150,75,50,25&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

McConnell thinks he can wait a few days and eventually the protests will die down. But with all that we've fought for at risk, we won't be slowing down. Not today, not tomorrow, not ever. **That 's why Senate Democrats are leading the charge and challenging the GOP every step of the way.**

[**But if we don 't have their backs, McConnell's shady ways will prevail. So don't wait, team -- pitch in before tomorrow's FEC deadline to strike back against McConnell's cruel agenda >>**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care-triple-match?refcode=DPE-20170629-TMUpdate_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Keep up the fight,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4de/2b07114c/25a87401/731062f7/3261894534/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4de/2b07114c/25a87401/731062f6/3261894534/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4de/2b07114c/25a87401/731062f1/3261894534/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233e6/4067b0a/361f13c05/7e6a41bb/2360301677/VEsHAg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170630_dnc_nd&source=em_20170630_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170630_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233e6/4067b0a/361f13c05/7e6a41b8/2360301677/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_dnc_nd&source=em_20170630_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170630_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233e6/4067b0a/361f13c05/7e6a41b9/2360301677/VEsHDA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=19+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_dnc_nd&source=em_20170630_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170630_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233e6/4067b0a/361f13c05/7e6a4146/2360301677/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_dnc_nd&source=em_20170630_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170630_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Eloise Hincker
subject: May we deliver a Jill Vogel yard sign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

We just received our first shipment of yard signs for the general election and we are ready to start delivering them to our supporters in the coming weeks.
To get started, we're compiling a list of deliveries so we can drop off signs when we have enough locations in your area. Would you like a sign for your yard or your business? If so, [please click here and let us know where we should drop it off](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013tCKCCVq_q7EUjASY45xyV-Gl39Uwz2aSkZVsrq-85pgCQg03_EyASpGIUOCDXLKQcdInR2bN4dN96Wbh73jjsDdKt2-0gM3GmIJwFIxiPW6ity4Oe8qMd4KjcM4tCaXDgtERWaQ8dKjKG7FxwI9W6xb4t7xppkEZxpBe8FO3fSTYmR-OJrrD_zRLjW7ymLjtsQ18cxrjIQ=&c=lDBqWf4KGn9Mue9nFnrkESaBawVr3uI2DaYY5zBm4vbqSLhvhz-17w==&ch=_lLFlnE8gIejjQPWDQ99tqavOxL7HmHGTo5AZvyoz8PWFCHlkj44jg==).

---
| | | [Get Your Free Jill Vogel Yard Sign](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013tCKCCVq_q7EUjASY45xyV-Gl39Uwz2aSkZVsrq-85pgCQg03_EyASpGIUOCDXLKQcdInR2bN4dN96Wbh73jjsDdKt2-0gM3GmIJwFIxiPW6ity4Oe8qMd4KjcM4tCaXDgtERWaQ8dKjKG7FxwI9W6xb4t7xppkEZxpBe8FO3fSTYmR-OJrrD_zRLjW7ymLjtsQ18cxrjIQ=&c=lDBqWf4KGn9Mue9nFnrkESaBawVr3uI2DaYY5zBm4vbqSLhvhz-17w==&ch=_lLFlnE8gIejjQPWDQ99tqavOxL7HmHGTo5AZvyoz8PWFCHlkj44jg==)
---
| Our yard signs look great and endure the elements, so you don't have to worry about putting it out too soon. These are good signs and they will hold up until November.
Wouldn't this look great in your yard?

---
|
---
| We need your help to make sure we have enough signs for all of our supporters. [Please contribute $250, $100, $25, or even $5 to help pay for signs](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013tCKCCVq_q7EUjASY45xyV-Gl39Uwz2aSkZVsrq-85pgCQg03_EyAb5lHEj92FNQSeWqJIwh8nEC4eZ0cjvTwxyHePnEbIk-h-Pf5nRmnqRRj__m9zEFFlMJ-nyM47QrgmOB6_BVtB6l5S61-EA-wiL-6rnNeIs3umzCWqT8tA2n9HYFVpWARrWzXp4TNZjp3BM-7njRZMLX4YmTNiTMzuiH9330NsYWrYrdZKSFnaqDPfF70QRR-w==&c=lDBqWf4KGn9Mue9nFnrkESaBawVr3uI2DaYY5zBm4vbqSLhvhz-17w==&ch=_lLFlnE8gIejjQPWDQ99tqavOxL7HmHGTo5AZvyoz8PWFCHlkj44jg==) if you are able, so we will have enough for every neighborhood across the entire Commonwealth.
If you don't have a yard or can't put out signs, there are other ways you can help.
First, if you would like a bumper sticker for your car, [please click here and we will ship you one or more for free](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013tCKCCVq_q7EUjASY45xyV-Gl39Uwz2aSkZVsrq-85pgCQg03_EyATbOxT8c1D93bSXHzm_k3su46auipMviwSFd0L8pwRerQLs1ZlcDrXox59ghaLZOpZL1hPf2gRl4tZIBMMKEbutVEyd_aF2ADBkQyolc2P4rRrkhJ5VG8aXJTfGVQH31qDwZ14RvFd85qlOoykv2UcuTiXNNapMxcw==&c=lDBqWf4KGn9Mue9nFnrkESaBawVr3uI2DaYY5zBm4vbqSLhvhz-17w==&ch=_lLFlnE8gIejjQPWDQ99tqavOxL7HmHGTo5AZvyoz8PWFCHlkj44jg==).
Our campaign also needs volunteers to help us share our positive message at every event in every county in Virginia. If you would like to help volunteer at local events or even write letters to the editor of your local paper, [please click here to volunteer](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013tCKCCVq_q7EUjASY45xyV-Gl39Uwz2aSkZVsrq-85pgCQg03_EyAUAP5GleR3vMK-QXiaYH7LJB_yIXOsv0aW-hDPgBjVWWQ3Q2QByJbi2Ye4A6oQhcqce6c2AgoZmDHJ_9rE8ChwniCQik5BysY4fCVK4AQdZXB4LqJI9T_CY=&c=lDBqWf4KGn9Mue9nFnrkESaBawVr3uI2DaYY5zBm4vbqSLhvhz-17w==&ch=_lLFlnE8gIejjQPWDQ99tqavOxL7HmHGTo5AZvyoz8PWFCHlkj44jg==) and a member of our team will be in touch.
With your support, we look forward to victory this November.

Sincerely,
Eloise HinckerCampaign Coordinator, Vogel for Virginia

---
| |

name: Tim Kaine
subject: What's at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
---
Dear Derek,

Virginia has come a long way in the 33 years since I moved to Richmond.

We've gotten more socially inclusive, more economically dynamic, more politically competitive and better educated.

And I've played my part. I started as a civil rights lawyer -- battling housing discrimination.

I was a Richmond city council member and Mayor -- building schools, cutting crime, adding jobs.

Then I was Lieutenant Governor and Governor -- and Virginia was ranked America's best managed state, best state for business and best state to raise a child.

And now I am proud to represent Virginia in the Senate -- fighting to support our troops and military families, advancing education, protecting health care, lifting up the goodness of our country to make up for an Administration that too often descends to meanness.

**The positive arc of our Commonwealth is the thing I am most proud of in my political career. But it's in jeopardy in 2018.**

| [](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=1XMu2lw%2BydzyfBVWQSoK2%2FhmMv3EN%2FYO)
---

A likely Republican candidate is a pro-Confederate, anti-immigrant bully who says he was "Trump before Trump was Trump" and brags about how much fun it will be to beat me.

We've seen a lot of division over the course of our history. But in 2017, we are united -- from the Appalachia of my wife's family to the agricultural splendor of Southside and the Shenandoah Valley, from the quirky arts and culture vibe in Richmond to our military bases in Hampton Roads, from the pristine Eastern Shore to the digital hum of diverse Northern Virginia.

We can't go back to politicians who divide us, who preach fear and anger. We have to make Virginia a true Commonwealth -- a community where all can thrive.

That's been our mission -- both Anne's and mine -- for our entire lives. It's important. And we need you.

**[Please contribute to show that Virginia is for lovers, not dividers.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=m5jWJjpaE953XfECLcy3gvhmMv3EN%2FYO)**

Thanks!

Tim
| [**DONATE**](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=o9ovlflTytZkzXVAxt9%2FGfhmMv3EN%2FYO)
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=PLMUWorT0tskkQ9TnAVC7PhmMv3EN%2FYO).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: LegitAction Team
subject: How hard can we push?
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
The next 3 months will be crucial. We must meet our goal to put everything into these fights.
The next 3 months will be crucial. We must meet our goal to put everything into these fights. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf471d/1c469400/3fc4775/354baa4/2163737892/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitaction_donate?refcode=20170630_EOQ2_msg_2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170630_EOQ2_msg_2&source=20170630_EOQ2_msg_2") Friend, We're going to keep being frustrated by the outcomes of important races in this country -- unless we successfully address the issues of legitimacy in our democracy. LegitAction is the only organization solely dedicated to addressing these issues. The past three months alone, LegitAction has:
* Supported local activists pushing **Alaska, Connecticut, and Oregon** to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and end the Electoral College;
* Started building momentum for a new **_21st Century Voting Rights Act_** to end the assault on voting rights and restore the power of voters in the political process;
* Amped up nationwide pressure to appoint a **special counsel** to investigate the Trump campaign's Russia ties, and into Trump's repeated efforts to thwart the FBI's investigation;
* And much more.

We can keep pushing on these crucial issues in the next three months -- but how hard we can push is another matter. That will depend on whether or not we hit our end-of-quarter goal by midnight tonight. Right now, we're $2,660 of the way there. But we need to step it up now. [**_Step it up now. name: Tom Perez
subject: re: tonight's FEC-mandated deadline
body:
Pitch in before our end-of-quarter deadline tonight!
---
** OFFICIAL 2017 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: Derek
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2017 DONOR: Not yet

**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight to help elect Democrats all across the country.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d0d/1496996073/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")**
**
Derek --

First of all, I want to thank you for everything you've done to fight against the GOP's health care repeal. Millions of Americans from every corner of this country made calls, sent emails and letters, rallied, and protested. It's because of your energy that Mitch McConnell was forced to put off the repeal vote -- and that's a big deal.

But that wasn't all that happened this week.

Yesterday, after a Supreme Court ruling on Monday, part of Donald Trump's hateful and un-American Muslim ban went into effect.

Earlier in the week, Donald Trump's EPA began rolling back President Obama's clean water rule, opening up our drinking water to polluters. And it was reported earlier this year that EPA Administrator Scott Pruitt overruled scientists and blocked an effort to ban a toxic pesticide -- after meeting with the CEO of Dow Chemical.

That doesn't mean we shouldn't have been focused on defending health care -- in fact just the opposite. Donald Trump and his Republican allies in Congress want to undo all the progress we've made and fundamentally change the direction our country is going in, so we cannot let up for even a second.

We're on the right side of history, Derek. We just have to keep our resistance going strong -- on health care, on the environment, on religious freedom, and everything else.

So let's get to work. Chip in $3 or whatever you can before our deadline at midnight.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a30d3/1496996073/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a30d1/1496996073/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a30df/1496996073/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a30dd/1496996073/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d17/1496996073/VEsB/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd")
** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d14/1496996073/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d15/1496996073/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d12/1496996073/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/405233f0/4067b0a/36073fd8b/7e6a4d13/1496996073/VEsHBA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp_nd&source=em_20170630_tp_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: The four pillars of legitimacy
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
Even at a time when Republicans control so much in Washington, we can stop growing corporate control.
| [](https://act.legitaction.com/go/53?t=2&akid=116.356062.ds81-Q) Friend, The legitimacy of our country's elections and government is under tremendous assault. Right now in America, there are concerted attacks on the rights of all people to participate -- and concerted efforts to keep government from reflecting the people's voices even when they do weigh in. That's unacceptable in a democracy, where legitimacy comes from the people. I founded LegitAction to get beyond the day-to-day Trump scandals and focus on restoring the one thing we can't afford to lose: our legitimacy. [**_Watch my video introduction today and share it with your friends and family:_**](https://act.legitaction.com/go/52?t=3&akid=116.356062.ds81-Q) [](https://act.legitaction.com/go/52?t=4&akid=116.356062.ds81-Q) Over the past seven plus years, the GOP and their billion-dollar corporate backers have led an assault on four of the most important pillars of our democracy:
1. The right to vote
2. The popular vote
3. Campaign finance reform
4. The Supreme Court

But even at a time when Republicans control so much in Washington, we can stop this. We can stop the corporate control of this country through grassroots organizing. [**_Watch the short video I recorded today to learn more about how we can stop the corporate control of this country._**](https://act.legitaction.com/go/52?t=5&akid=116.356062.ds81-Q) I want to continue to do my part to fight for our democracy, and I'm glad you do too. We must restore America's democratic legitimacy, and only the people of this great nation can do it. Glad to have you on board, Russ Feingold
LegitAction | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://act.legitaction.com/go/51?t=6&akid=116.356062.ds81-Q)
---

I founded LegitAction to get beyond the day-to-day Trump scandals and focus on restoring the one thing we can't afford to lose: our legitimacy. Over the past seven plus years, the GOP and their billion-dollar corporate backers have led an assault on four of the most important pillars of our democracy: 1. The right to vote 2. The popular vote 3. Campaign finance reform 4. The Supreme Court But even at a time when Republicans control so much in Washington, we can stop this. We can stop the corporate control of this country through grassroots organizing. I want to continue to do my part to fight for our democracy, and I'm glad you do too. We must restore America's democratic legitimacy, and only the people of this great nation can do it. Glad to have you on board, Russ Feingold LegitAction | | Authorized and paid for by LegitAction, Inc. All content (C) 2017 LegitAction, Inc., All Rights Reserved LegitAction, Inc PO Box 620061 Middleton, WI 53562

name: Debbie
subject: Strike while the iron is red-hot
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friends,

Republicans may have delayed the vote on their health care bill, but that just means they are regrouping so they can try again. They still have every intention of implementing what would be a nightmare for our seniors, children, the poor, the disabled, and millions more.

We can't let down our guard, not for one moment.

[_**Our match program is only unlocked for 14 more hours. Your impact gets doubled and we can double down on our efforts to protect our health care.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113eca/622b7b5b/436f537/307bc31e/444036353/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170630?refcode=dwse170630_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Our resistance has chipped away at the Republican effort to repeal the Affordable Care Act. It's already stalled. With enough pressure, we can crack their effort apart and defend the progress that we spent years fighting for. Together, let's strike while the iron is red-hot.

[_**Make sure the Republican effort to repeal the ACA is delayed indefinitely >>**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113eca/622b7b5b/436f537/307bc31e/444036353/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170630?refcode=dwse170630_m&recurring=true&amount=5") | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113eca/622b7b5b/436f537/307bc31e/444036353/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dwse170630?refcode=dwse170630_m&recurring=true&amount=5")

Debbie

| Friends,

What a month it's been. Donald Trump backed out of the Paris Climate Agreement, marking a drastic setback for global efforts to stop climate change. James Comey confirmed under oath that Donald Trump attempted to interfere in an FBI investigation. And Republican senators are negotiating as we speak on "healthcare" legislation that would cause 22 million Americans to lose care.

One thing is clear: **more than ever, we need strong Democrats in office to defend our values and work toward progress on the issues that matter to hard-working American families. Only a Democratic takeover in Washington can fully put a stop to Donald Trump and Republicans in the House and Senate.**

Friends, we deserve leaders who are honest, transparent, and work for us. Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan aren't those leaders, so let's work together to elect true champions to represent us.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Watch President Donald J. Trump's weekly address to the Nation:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f8e42c23530587be3ae554e4625e8a1c384a2428d22f3d3a9235a68106ddb50c61f76806dbea950cf4bf6d4eeb5760261)**Watch President Donald J. Trump's weekly address** to the Nation: [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f4a2d8679e6875a5f0897009dfa689b8f153b1f68a1bc3b15ccd3c227db306f128807c0a6ad3865fe2645975bb80345ff)
# Today's Events
**9:30 AM:** President Trump speaks to President Recep Tayyip Erdogan of Turkey**10:10 AM:** President Trump welcomes President Moon of the Republic of Korea - [Watch ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f92ef6bce0ea29ffa4b84aa5520990f1dc60a1334ea41405e9ce144429ad531bafa40cacc04e76e15f6b26911bee59fc8)**10:15 AM:** President Trump meets with President Moon**10:35 AM:** President Trump leads an expanded bilateral meeting with President Moon**11:15 AM:** President Trump gives joint statements with President Moon - [Watch ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fb43323275c9cb5cb95312b2de2c2c52fbaee1a7a19e9639e40ff103e358c6bd093f139041c757c405af76363c5fed3c3)**2:00 PM:** Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders**4:20 PM:** President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump depart Washington, D.C. en route to Bedminster, New Jersey
# Photo of the Day
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fef8ae0079b2e29f6f14e7d01204e982f94cb93c944de000f9f37ba7ff08ed5d70327a9041299a86ac78b635722b7f5a2)**President Donald J. Trump at the Department of Energy** | June 29, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)
# OBAMACARE FACT OF THE DAY
**FACT:** Six issuers have [abandoned Obamacare](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fc504b7031040e77a75659727f31fdb70d5d7bc78a12c00beaadb5c43739a420fabc1070fca3a9eeda4c469298f46f69b) in Kentucky and nearly 50% of counties have only one provider and no choices. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1ff7f41b973cefd821fcce4b55cc83cbf2035b58a4400cc9f719d30fee54c0c74d5a81f4e185df2cfd7522fdca59072793)
# WHITE HOUSE UPDATES
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f6eeaa061335ca3f914e19a281f090c57dd5e95063bf5345d64432fb2484a7286fd480305f45eb7dac66f93fd03ca6922)**Yesterday, President Trump**[ delivered remarks ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fcf881a12f325fe4ba7d2728d5f637eead5d7879d4527adfecd867645c73b1ea543381336703ac35c4b322a6710947c87) at the Unleashing American Energy Event at the Department of Energy. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f9aaecc270249a1a60627434955254c7ac7943d41eed5a3328179caa8c3085325bf15a014c7234a35b1c01957333c572d)**Last night, President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump**[ hosted ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fcf983a54bed5309fc4ab1f2ef2adc59b0c89c7507dc7dad454164499d80d6eeb8dc364db77a6f31668169bfb100aab14) President Moon Jae-in and First Lady Kim Jung-sook of the Republic of Korea for a working dinner at the White House. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f096c606a6547192eeb8a7912b39ea2901adda44d00f4515122b307105e305b082023672757d91d47e65bc79e79d63db8)**Yesterday, Vice President Pence**[ met ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fc3197fa9ec652adb8640d5abd26e6c029bee7a13a3eed869c22e6809e8e75a67629f2cde4beff66942c4c83fa6e97ff7)with Senators to work on repealing and replacing Obamacare. [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f18327030e8f10553ff3eaa4bbb6745124a0afaba214d53c54590b3482cd302222e923cc1dee9185ad3434686ea8a5fe8)
# West Wing Reads
Each day we round up the best stories the West Wing is reading and share them with you. **Sign up below!**[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f5fd216bb8c67a93ac4094d613ce3392cfce707f9935db4b6b2781c60c3f1ab7c878fe7c6a8dd5415ed38c7e17aabe585)
---

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1fd9c649608f57f437f4ad8d3892d9e094f566f41621cd0eccb006e6d77886c5cac3c1e7e08148ce081706ad1a16d718d1) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=d32d1f822b7aff1f734647fc00244a8fd5b7339de3369be5b1d48fe92a05194a2a0be9482ed3980cbc77d969d94175f56a549bce4def8a89) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d489b1c5977c11cb27e07ec8a447839f0322df8b13df887f43435fcdc208a2269e221098ac32b1a5210f93ec3252460f60)

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Three things, Derek
body:
Help us keep fighting.
---
**Before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help elect more Democrats.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e14/4018780640/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")****
Derek --

I've been taking some time to think about everything that's happened this year. Not what Donald Trump has tweeted or what Republicans have done, but about you.

Your fighting spirit inspires me every day. From the Women's March on January 21st to rallies to protect our health care today, millions of people from every corner of this country, of every background, have come together to show that we will not be silenced. **[We are here. We are fired up. And we will resist.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e15/4018780640/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+We+are+here+We+are+fired+up+And+we+will+&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")**

But for Democrats to be successful, we have to turn the energy of these movements into votes at the polls. So right now, our party has three critical missions:

1. Continue to resist the GOP's dangerous agenda and hold Donald Trump accountable.
2. Support all the Democratic candidates who are running in tough off-year elections this year in states like Virginia and New Jersey.
3. Lay the groundwork for our 50-state strategy so we can burst out of the gate at full speed in 2018.

Grassroots supporters like you have already shown you're ready to do whatever it takes to win, so I'm coming directly to you to make sure we can do these three things. Pitch in $3 or more before tonight's quarterly fundraising deadline.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e12/4018780640/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e13/4018780640/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")

[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e11/4018780640/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")

[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e1f/4018780640/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd")
** Thanks for everything,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e1c/4018780640/VEsP/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e1d/4018780640/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e1a/4018780640/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052320b/4067b0a/36f14a693/7e6a3e1b/4018780640/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170630_ke_nd&source=em_20170630_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170630_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
clean_body: Help us keep fighting. Before tonight's end-of-quarter deadline, pitch in $3 or more to help elect more Democrats. ""** Derek -- I've been taking some time to think about everything that's happened this year. Not what Donald Trump has tweeted or what Republicans have done, but about you. Your fighting spirit inspires me every day. From the Women's March on January 21st to rallies to protect our health care today, millions of people from every corner of this country, of every background, have come together to show that we will not be silenced. "" But for Democrats to be successful, we have to turn the energy of these movements into votes at the polls. So right now, our party has three critical missions: 1. Continue to resist the GOP's dangerous agenda and hold Donald Trump accountable. 2. Support all the Democratic candidates who are running in tough off-year elections this year in states like Virginia and New Jersey. 3. Lay the groundwork for our 50-state strategy so we can burst out of the gate at full speed in 2018. Grassroots supporters like you have already shown you're ready to do whatever it takes to win, so I'm coming directly to you to make sure we can do these three things. Pitch in $3 or more before tonight's quarterly fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. "" "" "" "" "" "" ** Thanks for everything, Keith Keith Ellison Deputy Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This fight is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The fight to protect the Affordable Care Act is personal for me. When I was 12, my daddy had a heart attack.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170630-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

The fight to protect the Affordable Care Act is personal for me. When I was 12, my daddy had a heart attack. He was out of work for a long time, and the medical bills piled up. We lost our family station wagon, and we were about an inch away from losing our home.

Today, our family probably wouldn't have made it.

We all know someone -- a cancer survivor, a mom who went into early labor, or a parent or grandparent who got Alzheimer's or Parkinson's and needed help. Any of us could get bad news from a doctor that our insurance plans wouldn't cover.

Mitch McConnell delayed a vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act this week, but this fight isn't over. Not by a long shot. McConnell is planning to try again immediately after the Senate returns from the July 4th holiday, and we have to be prepared.

[**Please contribute $1 before tonight 's fundraising deadline to stand with Senate Democrats and show the Republicans that we're not going to back down one inch in this fight.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170630-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We've already seen the Republicans' so-called "health care" bill come back to life before. It failed in the House -- and then passed weeks later. Now the same thing could happen in the Senate.

Mitch McConnell says he won't stop until he finds the votes to repeal the Affordable Care Act -- and as long he's still scheming, we can't stop fighting back.

I'm in this fight all the way -- I'll give it everything I've got. But if we're going to win, we need every single one of us in this fight. We need to fight like people's lives depend on it -- because people's lives will depend on what happens next.

[**Stand with Senate Democrats as we hold the line for Americans ' health care. Donate before the midnight deadline to keep us in this fight.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170630-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e5/2b07114c/25c8ce2f/731069ba/1998490393/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e5/2b07114c/25c8ce2f/731069b5/1998490393/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e5/2b07114c/25c8ce2f/731069b4/1998490393/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Team Ryan
subject: Re: midnight deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend,

The FEC end-of-quarter deadline is tonight.

We know you're a committed conservative, so we hope you'll show your support by chipping by **midnight tonight.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: 2018 Indiana GOP Convention. Evansville. Be There.
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
**_We're Going to Evansville_**
For only the second time in the history of the Indiana Republican Party, our State Convention will be held outside of Indianapolis! I made the announcement this morning in Evansville alongside State Party Secretary and State Representative **Holli Sullivan** , Evansville Mayor **Lloyd Winnecke** and members of the Evansville Host Committee.
Why Evansville? We are a statewide party. As such, it’s important that we hold events in every corner of Indiana as we work to build and grow our party for the future. That’s why we solicited bids for next year’s convention and why we're headed to Evansville on June 8-9, 2018.

As I said this morning, I congratulate Mayor Winnecke and the Evansville Host Committee on being selected as the host for our biennial convention. We received three very competitive bids, but the proposal submitted by the Evansville Host Committee blew us away. We look forward to Evansville showcasing their world-class amenities.

Based on the proposal submitted by the Evansville Host Committee, delegates, elected officials, candidates and guests will gather on Friday evening for a night of entertainment at the Ford Center in downtown Evansville. On Saturday, the approximately 1,700 Convention delegates will again gather at the Ford Center for the purpose of selecting the Republican Party’s nominees for Secretary of State, Treasurer of State and Auditor of State.

Here's what Governor **Eric Holcomb** had to say about the announcement: “The 2018 Indiana Republican Party State Convention is the perfect opportunity to recognize and celebrate the outstanding work Mayor Lloyd Winnecke and his team have done in revitalizing downtown Evansville. The city is experiencing a true renaissance thanks to his commitment to economic development and growth. I’m excited that Hoosier Republicans from all over the state will be able to savor the flavor of all that Evansville has to offer.”

And here's Mayor Winnecke's reaction: “We are thrilled to have the opportunity to showcase all of the great development and progress in Evansville. The City of Evansville has worked tirelessly to become a destination for statewide and regional conventions. This selection is affirmation of our effort. Our community will roll out the red carpet so that delegates and guests will have the chance to explore and celebrate Evansville’s top cultural districts, and see firsthand that _e is for everyone_.”

Finally, I want to acknowledge members of the Evansville Host Committee for the important work they have already put into this event and thank them for all the work to come! They are: Mayor Lloyd Winnecke, Chairman; **Marsha Abell** , FC Tucker Emge; **Harold Calloway** , Calloway State Farm Insurance; **Phyllip Davis** , Precinct Committeeman; **Christine Keck** , Energy Systems Group; **Jeff Knight** , Old National Bank; **Rick Martin** , Martin IP Law Group; **Wayne Parke** , Vanderburgh County Republican Party; **Mike Roeder** , Vectren Corporation; **Hobart Scales** , Vanderburgh County Republican Party; **Steve Schaefer** , City of Evansville; **Alfonso Vidal** , Vidal Plastics; **Bob Warren** , Evansville/Vanderburgh County Convention & Visitors Bureau

\- Kyle

(Photo: Chairman Hupfer is joined by Mayor Lloyd Winnecke and Indiana Republican Party Secretary and State Representative Holli Sullivan, along with members of the Evansville Host Committee, at a press conference announcing the selection of Evansville to host the 2018 Indiana Republican Party State Convention on Friday, June 30, 2017.)
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
|
---
|
---
---
| THANK YOU to everyone who came out to the Team Holcomb Launch Party on Tuesday night at the Lucas Estate. We were joined by over 600 Hoosier Republicans who know how important it is that we work together as a TEAM to continue electing proven and responsible Republican candidates to office. If you weren't able to make it and are wondering what Team Holcomb is, [here's a great explainer](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=844648997c&e=1acd9bb3d6) in the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette. The short version is that Team Holcomb is a game-changer. In bringing together the Eric Holcomb for Indiana campaign and the Indiana Republican Party to jointly raise funds, we will truly change the way we do politics moving forward. It's exciting and we're glad you could all be part of the fun.

Now to the real business of the week!

Governor **Eric Holcomb** spent the week conducting a number of ceremonial bill signings for important pieces of legislation. Among them was the [state's pre-K expansion bill](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=05f9e4dd91&e=1acd9bb3d6), bills targeted at ending our drug epidemic and an [executive order](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=6ef609bdf4&e=1acd9bb3d6) that will give Hoosiers with criminal records the second chance they deserve.

You can read about the Governor's visit to Richmond to sign the drug-related bills [here](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0d320429dc&e=1acd9bb3d6) AND don't miss [this amazing exclusive](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=9b7da012ac&e=1acd9bb3d6) one-on-one with Indiana's Canine-in-Chief Henry Holcomb (you might learn a thing or two!)
---
|
---
| **News You Can Use**
**Senator Todd Young** [applauds nomination of Dr. Jerome Adams as U.S. Surgeon General](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a8e07290e3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Jackie Walorski** [introduces bill to stop punishing seniors who work](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e24ac7c7fa&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Jim Banks** [leads Indiana GOP Delegation letter supporting end of WOTUS](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c56b65fa3&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Todd Rokita** [commends Supreme Court decision on President's Immigration Executive Order](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=99ded52f99&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congresswoman Susan Brooks** [introduces legislation to thwart cyber attacks](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=57f2ea1b6c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Luke Messer** [partners with Purdue President Mitch Daniels to help more students afford a college degree](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=904f90c4cf&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon** [statement on WOTUS Withdrawal](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=870de322d7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Events Calendar**
[Friday, June 30](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8d7fdd5f5a&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Harrison County GOP Golf Scramble
[Thursday, July 13](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=945bc5647a&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Vigo County GOP Picnic Night
[Saturday, July 15](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3818d43468&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Fayette County GOP Hog Roast/BBQ
[Saturday, August 5](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=935fc8adec&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Annual Buck Garden Party
[Thursday, August 17](http://indgop.us11.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e8a4838ea7&e=1acd9bb3d6) \- Perry-Spencer Republican Picnic

name: Al Franken
subject: The Math
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Mitch McConnell just announced that he's postponing a vote on the GOP bill to repeal Obamacare. Now, keep up the fight.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170630-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Dear Team,

You know how you've been making calls and writing postcards and showing up at town halls to protest Trumpcare? Well, it's working. Republicans are so nervous about their garbage health care bill, they've put off the vote.

For now.

**But here 's what Mitch McConnell is telling them:**_Relax. It 'll blow over. The President will tweet something insane, and everyone will get distracted, and we can bring this bill back. Heck, by the next election, everyone will have forgotten how we took away tens of millions of people's health care without so much as a public hearing._

Well, not in exactly those words. But that's what he's thinking.

**And it 's up to us to show every single Republican that we're not letting up.**

[**Click here right now to donate to the DSCC and show Republicans that we 're never going to stop fighting!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170630-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Ordinarily, I'm not much for punditry. I'd rather talk about the issues. And that's exactly what I've done since the moment this bill was created in the shadows -- showing how it would jack up costs for seniors, force rural hospitals to close, and ruin the lives of millions of American families.

But the math is what it is. There are 52 Republicans in the Senate. If just a few more of them start to think it's safe to support this bill, it's going to pass, and people are going to get hurt.

And while we can continue to try to reason with them, it may be that the only way to stop Republicans from moving forward with this bill is to scare them out of it.

**In other words: We need them to understand that, if they ever let this bill come back, it 'll cost them their jobs in the next election.**

[**And the best way to do that is to put our money where our values are -- and donate to the DSCC to help us run the most aggressive campaign in our history. Click here to give now!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170630-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I don't know what's going to happen from here on out. But I'm going to keep fighting like hell to protect people's health care. And I need your help -- not just to make the case for why it's so important, but to make my Republican colleagues understand that we won't let them sneak this bill through. Not now, not ever.

Thanks for doing your part.

Al

P.S.: We need to show Republicans we're serious, and we need to do it **now** \-- before Mitch McConnell can convince them to change their minds and put this bill on the floor for a vote. [**Please click here to make a donation and help me show my Republican colleagues that we aren 't going to let this go -- there's just too much at stake.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protect-our-care?refcode=DPE-20170630-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e1/2b07114c/3a1be751/7310550c/473200417/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e1/2b07114c/3a1be751/7310550f/473200417/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e4e1/2b07114c/3a1be751/7310550e/473200417/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Bob Muehlenkamp
subject: It's time we had a progressive governor in Maryland.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
#
Friends
It is no longer just a question of Larry Hogan's vetoing of paid sick leave and other legislation and his overall blocking of progress in our state. With Trump in the White House and a right wing party in control of our entire federal government, we are in a dangerous moment in our country.
States have the power and the ability to stand up to the Republican reactionary policies. But the leadership we get from Larry Hogan is... silence. Whether it's dropping out of the Paris climate agreement or cutting desperately needed Medicaid funds in what Bernie Sanders calls a "barbaric" and "unspeakable" repeal of the ACA and transferring almost a trillion dollars to the top 1%, all we get from Larry Hogan is silence. And silence is complicity.
It's time for a change. We need a new Governor who will make sure Maryland stands up to Trump. But we need even more than that. It is clear that just being anti-Trump and anti-Hogan is not enough. We must make sure the candidate opposing Hogan presents a clear vision of change--a confident belief that we can have a $15 minimum wage in Maryland and stop mass incarceration and have debt free college education and stop oil and gas pipelines crisscrossing our state and save the Chesapeake Bay. It's' time for an authentic truly progressive governor in Maryland.
On May 19, Our Revolution Maryland sent out a candidate questionnaire to all 8 announced and potential gubernatorial candidates and we asked them if they would attend a candidate forum on June 24. Only one candidate, Ben Jealous, returned the questionnaire and committed to attend the forum.
On June 24th leaders from all Our Revolution Maryland chapters held a conference call with Mr. Jealous. After that call our chapter leaders voted unanimously to recommend that we endorse Ben Jealous for governor. **As an Our Revolution Maryland supporter, we are asking you to approve that recommendation.**
[**Register your approval or disapproval of this recommendation here**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/620359e8/1342584911/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/vote-on-our-revolution-marylands-2018-gubernatorial-endorsement-of-benjamin-jealous?clear_id=true&source=direct_link")
****[Vote here!](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/620359e8/1342584911/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/vote-on-our-revolution-marylands-2018-gubernatorial-endorsement-of-benjamin-jealous?clear_id=true&source=direct_link")****
If Our Revolution Maryland does endorse Ben Jealous for Governor, we will use this gubernatorial election to continue to build the independent grassroots political movement Bernie Sanders is leading so we can elect progressive candidates up and down the ballot and hold elected officials accountable for resisting Trump and moving Maryland forward. This will also be the next step in Our Revolution Maryland nominating Ben for the endorsement of Our Revoliution National, which will make available massive organizing power and other resources.
Should you have questions as to where Ben stands on the issues, we're attaching his questionnaire in** [ this link](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/620359e9/1342584911/VEsF/ "https://drive.google.com/file/d/0B1M8OTspwqZaTTVyN0pIVTE2LTA/view?usp=sharing")**.
We look forward to hearing from you about this important step in making sure Maryland leads America in moving forward into a progressive future.
In Solidarity,
Bob Muehlenkamp
Board Chair
Our Revolution Maryland
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/62035996/1342584911/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123 "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/62035997/1342584911/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c31/43f17890/c7739dce/62035994/1342584911/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b2b/24c69fd9/d197f0a5/18e68988/3456311969/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE647N_digital_email_20170630_BasicGovsKick_inact&source=WQEFE647N_digital_email_20170630_BasicGovsKick_inact")

Peter,

Governors are a critical line of defense against attacks by Republicans that harm women.

The only two pro-choice Democratic women governors in the **_entire country_** are up for re-election next year. We want to keep them in office and add to their ranks by electing five more -- and we can do it if this community steps up early to help their campaigns.

**Donate $3 before midnight to help hit our $250,000 End-Of-Quarter goal and elect our seven fantastic gubernatorial candidates:**

name: Grassroots Action Alert (via FlaDems.com)
subject: step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Team,

Our first FEC deadline since Washington Republicans announced their latest version of Trumpcare is only hours away. Unless we hit our goal, we'll be unable to fight back against their extremist agenda here in Florida.

That's why we're pushing so hard to beat our goal. But we need our grassroots supporters like you to help us make up the difference.

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: tonight's FEC-mandated deadline at midnight
body:
Pitch in before our end-of-quarter deadline tonight!
---
** OFFICIAL 2017 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: Derek
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2017 DONOR: Not yet

**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight to help elect Democrats all across the country.

** **[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523217/4067b0a/36ce5cb3f/7e6a2ade/2412785003/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/June-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp2_nd&source=em_20170630_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp2_nd")**
**
Derek --

Tonight is the most important deadline we've faced so far this year. It's as simple as that.

Donald Trump's unfavorability rating just reached a new high -- 60% of Americans disapprove of the job he is doing. We can channel that into winning back our majorities in both the House and Senate next year to serve as a check on Trump, but only if we press our advantage.

We have to start laying the foundation this summer to win in 2018, and we can't do that unless our best grassroots supporters -- like you -- step up.

It's up to you, Derek. Chip in $3 or more before the clock strikes midnight.

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523217/4067b0a/36ce5cb3f/7e6a2adf/2412785003/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/june-deadline-2017?express_lane=true&amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170630_tp2_nd&source=em_20170630_tp2_nd&refcode=em_20170630_tp2_nd")

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I'll fight for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26cc/7377f838/36b390d4/51fb0f69/3790379938/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

I couldn't have made it through this week without you. I stood strong against an attempt to pass a disastrous health care bill until Mitch McConnell withdrew his proposal -- and then redoubled my efforts to make sure the Senate works together, and that any new health care bill takes us forward, not back.

Now I need your help again. Our biggest end-of-quarter deadline so far is tonight, and yet we're still $858 short of our crucial goal. **But I know I can count on you to help us get there so I can keep fighting for you.**

**[We're so close. Can you chip in $5 and help me reach this goal before our biggest deadline yet?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26cc/7377f838/36b390d4/51fb0f68/3790379938/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170630nd&amount=10")**

I was proud to stand with Hoosiers this week and against the special interests who wanted to take away health care from millions of people. But now they're lining up against me with millions of dollars in false ads. When their attempts to replace affordable health care with tax breaks for the wealthy continue to fail, they'll smear my name and distort my record.

**That 's a price I'll gladly pay because I know folks like you have my back, Peter.** I'd take our grassroots support over dark money millions every day of the week. When we work together, there's nothing we can't achieve for Indiana.

**I know you 'll have my back on this goal, but we need to hit it so I can focus on representing Hoosiers instead of having to defend my name from attack ads. Midnight's coming soon, but my campaign is still behind.** **[Will you donate $5 right now to get us over the line?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26cc/7377f838/36b390d4/51fb0f68/3790379938/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170630nd&amount=10")**

Make no mistake -- the same hard-liners who nearly just took health care away from nearly 300,000 Hoosiers are going to try again. We need to make sure we're ready to fight off their false attacks and keep an independent voice in the Senate. That starts tonight.

Thanks,

Joe ** ** | **[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26cc/7377f838/36b390d4/51fb0f6b/3790379938/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-juneeoq?refcode=20170630nd&amount=25")**
---
** **

|
---

Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c26cc/7377f838/36b390d4/51fb0f6a/3790379938/VEsD/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")

name: Paul Ryan
subject: tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

I wanted to highlight some major conservative wins to show how your support really does make a difference.
* Early in the year we got to work immediately and **struck 14 Obama regulations from the books**.
* Then we laid the groundwork for **Obamacare 's full repeal.**
* Last month, we** relieved small businesses from burdensome Obama-approved red tape.**
* And earlier this month, we** protected our veterans by bringing accountability to the VA. **** **

[**Chip in $25 right now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=Mjk2MDgwNjYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2Mzg1MTIxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

What's next? Well, right now we're working to **enforce immigration laws and cracking down on sanctuary cities**, **rebuilding our military, protecting our borders, and reforming the tax code.**

Not only have we secured these policy wins, but we've also had incredible results with the special elections. **So let 's add one more victory to our list by closing out the month with a strong FEC report.

[Chip in $50 right now >>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=Mjk2MDgwNjYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2Mzg1MTIxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Because we need to finish strong, **I am triple matching every donation made to House Republicans before midnight tonight**.

**[Triple your impact now>>](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=Mjk2MDgwNjYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2Mzg1MTIxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Paul Ryan

P.S. With the end-of-quarter FEC deadline tonight, we need to take action now.** Use this opportunity to triple your impact for your conservative values.**

| [**Triple your impact **](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=Mjk2MDgwNjYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2Mzg1MTIxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: We're helping to elect revolutionaries
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
grassroots strategy that you are leading has helped hundreds of local organizing chapters
#
Friends,
From Jackson, Mississippi, to Philadelphia, St. Louis, Iowa, Colorado, Delaware, Texas, Virginia, Vermont, California, Portland, San Antonio, Long Island, and South Fulton, Georgia, you have spent the first half of 2017 helping bold candidates who are trying to create a country that works for everyone.
Our Revolution is the vehicle for progressive political change and you are the drivers. The grassroots strategy that you are leading has helped hundreds of local organizing chapters make an impact in their communities, and we're only getting started.
**[We need your support to ensure we have the resources to keep electing progressive candidates. Can you chip in $5 before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c36/43f17890/c7fb980a/62034706/2464539892/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-eoq?refcode=em170630-full")**
From city council members, board of education members, and mayors to state representatives, state senators, district attorneys, and state Democratic Party chairs, you have led the way to change politics across the country at every level.
State Representatives Monica Kurth and Christine Pellegrino are bringing our progressive principles onto the floor of their state houses in Iowa and New York. Mayor Chokwe Lumumba is organizing a People's Assembly in Jackson, Mississippi, and likely Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner is going to work with the community to eradicate the institutional racism and policies of mass incarceration that have plagued the city for decades.
[**Our movement is far reaching and growing larger each and every day. With our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline coming up at midnight, we need you to pitch in $5 to help us reach our goal and continue our work together.**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c36/43f17890/c7fb980a/62034706/2464539892/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-eoq?refcode=em170630-full")
We have the power to win more races and rise up together. The political revolution only gets stronger from here.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0c36/43f17890/c7fb980a/62034706/2464539892/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ourrev-eoq?refcode=em170630-full")**
PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
603 2ND ST, NE
WASHINGTON, DC, 20002

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
603 2nd St NE, Washington, DC 20002

Our Revolution is the vehicle for progressive political change and you are the drivers. The grassroots strategy that you are leading has helped hundreds of local organizing chapters make an impact in their communities, and we're only getting started. "" From city council members, board of education members, and mayors to state representatives, state senators, district attorneys, and state Democratic Party chairs, you have led the way to change politics across the country at every level. State Representatives Monica Kurth and Christine Pellegrino are bringing our progressive principles onto the floor of their state houses in Iowa and New York. Mayor Chokwe Lumumba is organizing a People's Assembly in Jackson, Mississippi, and likely Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner is going to work with the community to eradicate the institutional racism and policies of mass incarceration that have plagued the city for decades. "" We have the power to win more races and rise up together. The political revolution only gets stronger from here. name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: It’s time
disclaimer_text: paid for by LegitAction, Inc
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

I just wanted to send you a quick note because our deadline is so
close now, and we’re $8,755 of the way to reaching our $10,000
end-of-quarter goal by midnight.

These next three months will be crucial for the legitimacy of our
elections, our presidency, our democracy. We don’t want to go into the
next quarter without reaching this goal.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/go/108?t=1002&akid=119.356062.rMZhFY ]Contribute $3 to help reach LegitAction’s
$10,000 goal now, before the clock strikes midnight.

It’s time for progressives to think big and fight hard for our
democracy. We can make a difference if we work together.

Thank you for standing up for our democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold

subject: FWD: [Polls] Trump approval in 3 key Senate states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b1d/24c69fd9/cf3eee8e/18e6a287/3257605734/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE649N_digital_email_20170630_StateApprovalKicker_inact&source=WQEFE649N_digital_email_20170630_StateApprovalKicker_inact")

Peter,

WOW. It has been an absolute sprint to the end of this quarter, and I'm so impressed with how this community has stepped up.

We set an ambitious goal of raising $250,000 by midnight tonight, and we've already raised $208,198.

We have nine (nine!) Senate women who currently need resources for their tough re-election campaigns. Three of them are running in states Trump won, so they'll need all the help they can get.

**Donate $3 before midnight tonight to help reach our End-of-Quarter goal and support women like Tammy, Debbie, and Claire:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-Our-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7b1d/24c69fd9/cf3eee8e/18e6a280/3257605734/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170626_email_EOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachOurGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFE649N_digital_email_20170630_StateApprovalKicker_inact&source=WQEFE649N_digital_email_20170630_StateApprovalKicker_inact")**

Thanks for all you do,

Leigh K. Warren
Chief Operating Officer, EMILY's List

name: New Hampshire Republican Party
subject: Your Weekly NH GOP Newsletter
body:
| |
---
|
**NEW HAMPSHIRE REPUBLICAN PARTY**
**WEEKLY NEWSLETTER** FRIDAY, June 30th |
---|---|---
---
---
---
| | _**A Note From Jeanie**_ | |
---
| Dear Derek,
It’s been a busy week at the NHGOP headquarters. We’ve got eleven young people going through our iGOP Internship Program.
The IGOP intern program is designed to create a learning environment that can create a bench team available to the party or campaigns in the future. There are three components of iGOP: office training/skills; educational sessions; and experiential opportunities.
In their first couple of weeks, our interns have had Communications Training – learning how to post on social media, write press releases, and draft opinion editorials. They’ve also had web development training, learning how to build websites. They’ve had a field trip to the State House, meeting with various elected officials, and even had training from Republican National Committee staff on preparing for the 2018 election cycle.
We’re very fortunate to have a lot of highly qualified professionals here in New Hampshire who have generously donated their expertise and time to teach these young folks about the political process. Many thanks to everyone who has played a part in making this program a real success.
As we move into the holiday weekend to celebrate the 4th of July, the staff here at the NHGOP wish you and your family a safe and happy Independence Day!
Sincerely, _Jeanie_
_FUN FACT:_ John Adams believed that July 2nd was the correct date on which to celebrate the birth of American independence, and would reportedly turn down invitations to appear at July 4th events in protest. Adams and Thomas Jefferson both died on July 4, 1826—the 50th anniversary of the adoption of the Declaration of Independence. Adams and Thomas Jefferson both died on July 4, 1826—the 50th anniversary of the adoption of the Declaration of Independence.

clean_body: | | | NEW HAMPSHIRE REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, June 30th | ---|---|--- | | A Note From Jeanie | | | Dear Derek, It’s been a busy week at the NHGOP headquarters. We’ve got eleven young people going through our iGOP Internship Program. The IGOP intern program is designed to create a learning environment that can create a bench team available to the party or campaigns in the future. There are three components of iGOP: office training/skills; educational sessions; and experiential opportunities. In their first couple of weeks, our interns have had Communications Training – learning how to post on social media, write press releases, and draft opinion editorials. They’ve also had web development training, learning how to build websites. They’ve had a field trip to the State House, meeting with various elected officials, and even had training from Republican National Committee staff on preparing for the 2018 election cycle. We’re very fortunate to have a lot of highly qualified professionals here in New Hampshire who have generously donated their expertise and time to teach these young folks about the political process. Many thanks to everyone who has played a part in making this program a real success. As we move into the holiday weekend to celebrate the 4th of July, the staff here at the NHGOP wish you and your family a safe and happy Independence Day! Sincerely, Jeanie FUN FACT: John Adams believed that July 2nd was the correct date on which to celebrate the birth of American independence, and would reportedly turn down invitations to appear at July 4th events in protest. Adams and Thomas Jefferson both died on July 4, 1826—the 50th anniversary of the adoption of the Declaration of Independence. subject: last chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
Hey there, I'll make this quick. We're still $713 short of our goal. This is **your last chance** before the FEC deadline to make sure we raise the funds we need to stop Trump's agenda here in Florida.
